productDisplayName: ASICS Men Gel Enduro 7 Running Black Sports Shoes
description: The GEL-Enduro 7 is an entry level trail shoe for the off-road runner who seeks aggressive traction and a supportive Fit at an entry level price point.Upper Combination mesh and synthetic leather upper that's lightweight, comfortable and breathable while enhancing performance and fitLightly padded collar with nylon heel pull loopFabric-lined with removable socklinerContains reflective materials designed to enhance visibility during low light conditionsMidsoleCompression-molded EVA midsole for shock attenuation throughout the gait cycle Rearfoot GEL Cushioning System provides shock attenuation in the heel which attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycleUpper is stitched around a canvas or EVA board and directly attached to the midsole for stability and comfortOutsoleTrusstic System links the rearfoot and forefoot while shoring up the midfoot, which reduces the weight of the sole unit while retaining the structural integrity of the shoeTrail-specific outsole with reversed lugs provides uphill and downhill traction on all types of terrainAHAR Heel Plug enhances durability at initial impactasics-High-Abrasion-Rubber placed in critical areas of the outsole for exceptional durabilityShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierAvoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or direct sunlight
